description_long: This is a rectangular, pastel green juice carton with a white screw cap on top. The front face features playful illustrations of a cow riding a bicycle, along with white text and branding elements. The sides of the carton display nutritional information and recycling symbols, while the back face has a similar illustration of a cow lounging. The top of the carton is folded into a gable shape, with the cap positioned off-center. The overall design is clean and modern, with a matte finish and minimalistic graphics. The carton appears to be made of laminated paperboard, typical for juice packaging, and is likely filled with liquid.
description: A pastel green rectangular juice carton with playful cow illustrations, white branding, and a white screw cap on top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main branding, a cow on a bicycle illustration, and product information in white text.
description_view_1: Side view displays nutritional information and text details, with the white screw cap visible at the top edge.
description_view_2: Back view features a lounging cow illustration and minimal text, mirroring the front's style but with different artwork.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows recycling symbols, barcode, and additional product details, with the cap visible from the top.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: cartoon cow on a bicycle, cartoon cow lounging
